title: MMOF
overview: "MMOF" is unflinching and deals with the fury of a man pushed to the limits. Deepak (a mild-mannered, honest to the bone man) who tries to make ends meet by running a Cinema Theatre passed onto him by his father along with his family. A series of unexplained murders happening at his theatre force him through a roller-coaster ride filled with a whirlwind of emotions - The basic premise of "MMOF" is how Deepak solves this twisted jigsaw puzzle of a murder mystery and finds the Killer.
